title: The Crown Princess Mary Cancer Centre ransomware incident

victim.name: The Crown Princess Mary Cancer Centre

extortion.description: Westmead's service has been operating since 1994 at 75 Railway St, Mount Druitt, New South Wales, 2770, Australia and sees more than 500 families a year. The service is part of the Sydney West Cancer Network and has outreach services to Nepean Blue Mountains and Wagga/Bathurst/Orange (by Telehealth).
